data.title: Lloyds Banking Group Cancels 5 Million Shares in Ongoing Buyback
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.

Lloyds Banking ( (GB:LLOY) ) has issued an update.

Lloyds Banking Group has repurchased 5,000,000 ordinary shares on 2 July 2026 through Goldman Sachs International as part of its existing share buyback programme. The shares, bought at a volume-weighted average price of 113.8668 pence and to be cancelled, signal continued capital return to shareholders and a targeted optimisation of the bank’s balance sheet and capital structure.

The buyback activity underscores Lloyds’ confidence in its financial position and future earnings, while potentially enhancing earnings per share and shareholder value over time. It also reflects ongoing capital management in a competitive U.K. banking sector where disciplined returns and efficient capital allocation are key to maintaining investor support and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:LLOY) stock is a Hold
with a £130.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lloyds Banking stock,
see the GB:LLOY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LLOY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LLOY is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by a strong, upgrade-supported earnings outlook and capital return plan from the latest call. This is tempered by weaker underlying financial quality signals (higher leverage and negative free cash flow in the last two years). Technically the trend is positive, but overbought indicators add near-term risk, while valuation and yield are supportive but not standout.

To see Spark’s full report on LLOY stock,
click here.

More about Lloyds Banking

Lloyds Banking Group is a major U.K. financial services group focused on retail and commercial banking, insurance, and wealth management. It operates under well-known brands including Lloyds Bank, Halifax, and Bank of Scotland, serving a broad customer base across the United Kingdom with a focus on mainstream consumer and business banking services.

Current Market Cap: £65.24B

data.title: STAR7 Secures €20 Million Bridge Loan to Fund Extraordinary Dividend
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Star7 S.p.A ( (IT:STAR7) ) just unveiled an announcement.

STAR7 S.p.A., traded on Euronext Growth Milan, operates in the product information services industry, offering end-to-end support from engineering-related documentation to technical and marketing content creation, translation, printing and virtual experience solutions. Leveraging technology and specialized expertise, the company serves major international industrial clients across the entire product life cycle, reinforcing its status as a global partner for complex product information management.

The company has signed a €20 million bridge financing agreement with Banca Nazionale del Lavoro and Banco BPM to fund the distribution of an extraordinary dividend of €2.2329 per share to its outstanding shares, as approved by shareholders on 29 June 2026. The move underlines STAR7’s commitment to returning value to investors while relying on short-term bank financing, and the scheduled ex-dividend, record and payment dates align with Borsa Italiana’s calendar, providing clarity and timing for shareholders on the cash payout.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:STAR7) stock is a Hold
with a EUR11.90 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Star7 S.p.A stock,
see the IT:STAR7 Stock Forecast page.

More about Star7 S.p.A

STAR7 S.p.A., listed on Euronext Growth Milan, provides an integrated range of product information services spanning product and process engineering support, technical and marketing content creation and management, translation, printing, and virtual experiences. The company’s solutions cover the entire product life cycle, from design through after-sales, and its combination of specialized know-how, technology and broad industrial vision has enabled partnerships with major international clients and established STAR7 as a credible global player in the product information services market.

STAR7 is part of the STAR Group network and positions itself as a reference point for manufacturers seeking to manage complex product information needs across multiple languages, formats and channels, supporting global industrial operations with scalable, end-to-end content and documentation services.

data.title: Character Group Cancels 5,000 Shares in Ongoing Buyback Programme
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Character ( (GB:CCT) ) has provided an announcement.

The Character Group plc has continued to execute its previously announced share buyback programme, purchasing 5,000 ordinary shares at a price of 292 pence per share. The shares, acquired via Panmure Liberum on AIM, have been cancelled, reflecting the board’s ongoing use of buybacks as a capital management tool.

Following this transaction, Character now holds 1,983,059 shares in treasury and has 17,380,949 shares in issue, which represents the total voting rights in the company. This updated share count becomes the new denominator for shareholders when assessing disclosure obligations, modestly increasing existing holders’ relative voting stakes and refining the group’s equity base.

Spark’s Take on CCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CCT is a Neutral.

The overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, including declining revenue and profitability, and weak cash flow generation. Technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, with the stock trading below key moving averages. Despite a high dividend yield, the negative P/E ratio highlights profitability concerns, making the stock less attractive to growth-focused investors.

To see Spark’s full report on CCT stock,
click here.

More about Character

The Character Group plc is a UK-listed company whose shares trade on AIM. It operates in the consumer products sector and its ordinary shares of £0.05 each are actively managed through ongoing share buyback activity. The company maintains a treasury position in its own stock, influencing its capital structure and shareholder voting base.

Character has structured its equity to include both issued shares and treasury holdings, giving it flexibility in capital management. The number of shares in issue, excluding treasury stock, is used to calculate voting rights and disclosure thresholds for investors under FCA transparency rules.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Agnico Eagle Halts Barnat Pit Mining After Wall Movement, Trims 2026–2028 Output Outlook
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Agnico Eagle ( (TSE:AEM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, Agnico Eagle reported a rock mass movement along the north wall of the Barnat open pit at the Canadian Malartic complex in Quebec, prompting a precautionary suspension of mining in the pit. There were no injuries, equipment damage or environmental impacts, and the event occurred in a zone already under enhanced geotechnical monitoring and safety exclusion protocols.

During the halt in pit mining, the Canadian Malartic processing plant will run on low-grade stockpiled ore to limit near-term disruption, but the company still expects a production loss of 60,000 to 80,000 ounces of gold at the site in the second half of 2026. As a result, full-year 2026 output is now projected near the lower end of the 3.3 million to 3.5 million ounce guidance range, and Barnat-related constraints are currently seen reducing annual production by up to 150,000 ounces in both 2027 and 2028.

Agnico Eagle’s technical teams are conducting a detailed geotechnical assessment to determine when operations at Barnat can restart safely, and further updates to production and cost guidance are due with second-quarter results on July 29, 2026. The company says the incident does not affect development or the production outlook for the Odyssey mine, nor its longer-term goal of reaching 1 million ounces of annual gold output from the Canadian Malartic complex in the early 2030s.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AEM) stock is a Hold
with a C$170.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Agnico Eagle stock,
see the TSE:AEM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AEM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AEM is a Outperform.

High score driven primarily by very strong financial fundamentals (elite balance sheet, strong margins, solid cash generation) and a positive earnings update with reaffirmed guidance and shareholder-return focus. The main offset is weak near-term technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD), while valuation is reasonable but not especially cheap.

To see Spark’s full report on AEM stock,
click here.

More about Agnico Eagle

Agnico Eagle Mines Limited is a Canadian-based gold producer and the country’s largest mining company, with operations in Canada, Australia, Finland and Mexico. Founded in 1957, it focuses on sustainable growth through a pipeline of development projects and has a long record of shareholder returns, having paid an annual cash dividend since 1983.

Average Trading Volume: 967,893

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$112.3B

See more insights into AEM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BPCL arm takes full control of Brazil oil and gas venture for Rs 2,312 crore
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest update is out from Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited ( (IN:BPCL) ).

Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited has completed the acquisition of full control of IBV Brasil Petroleo Limitada through its indirect wholly owned subsidiary, BPRL Ventures BV. BPRL Ventures BV increased its stake in IBV from 60.86% to 100% by purchasing an additional 39.14% shareholding for Rs. 2,312 crore in a cash transaction that closed on 1 July 2026.

IBV, incorporated in Brazil in 2005, holds participating interests in oil and gas concessions in the country but reported no turnover in 2023, 2024 and 2025. The deal, cleared by DIPAM and NITI Aayog, is aimed at providing BPCL with additional equity oil and gas from Brazilian assets, reinforcing India’s energy security and strengthening BPCL’s upstream portfolio in the global oil and gas sector.

More about Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited

Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited is a Government of India enterprise and one of the country’s leading integrated oil and gas companies. It is active across refining, marketing and upstream exploration, with international ventures such as BPRL Ventures BV supporting its strategy to secure energy supplies for the Indian market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: M Vest Water Grants 645,000 Share Options Under Long-Term Incentive Plan
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

M Vest Water AS ( (DE:7YA) ) has shared an announcement.

M Vest Water has allocated 645,000 share options to executive management and key employees under its long-term incentive program, in line with terms approved by shareholders. Of this, 300,000 options went to primary insiders, including CFO Morten Hilton Thomassen and COO Henrik Meland Madsen, with each option giving the right to subscribe for one share at a strike price of NOK 5.55.

The options vest in three equal tranches annually from 2027 to 2029 and expire three years after each vesting date, bringing the total outstanding options in the company to 1,115,000. The move underscores M Vest Water’s use of equity-based incentives to align management and key staff with shareholder interests as it pursues growth in the water treatment industry.

More about M Vest Water AS

M Vest Water AS is an environmental technology company focused on developing non-toxic, biodegradable water treatment products and solutions for both industrial and municipal markets. Listed on Euronext Growth under the ticker MVW, the company targets high levels of purification through cost-efficient systems designed to minimize environmental impact.

data.title: Rockhopper ties executive options to three-year shareholder return test
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Rockhopper Exploration ( (GB:RKH) ) has issued an update.

Rockhopper Exploration has granted new share options to senior executives under its 2025 Long Term Incentive Plan, aligning management rewards with shareholder returns. Chief executive Sam Moody received options over 997,044 shares and chief financial officer William Perry was awarded 703,013 options, all structured as nominal-cost options.

The awards will vest based on total shareholder return achieved over a three-year period to June 2029, with full vesting requiring at least a 15% compound annual return and no vesting below 5%. The structure underscores the company’s intention to tie executive remuneration to sustained share price performance, introducing a one-year post-vesting holding period and up to seven years to exercise vested options, which may influence management incentives and investor perceptions of governance.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RKH) stock is a Buy
with a £130.00 price target.

The score is held down primarily by very weak and inconsistent operating performance (negligible revenue and recurring operating losses) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD and depressed RSI/Stoch). Positive operating/free cash flow in 2024–2025 and a reasonably equity-backed balance sheet provide partial support, but rising leverage and volatile fundamentals keep the overall rating low.

data.title: China Yuchai International Declares US$0.87 Cash Dividend for FY2025
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Hong Leong Asia ( (SG:H22) ) has provided an announcement.

China Yuchai International, listed on the NYSE, operates through its principal subsidiary Guangxi Yuchai Machinery Company Limited, one of China’s leading powertrain solutions manufacturers. Founded in 1951, Yuchai designs, manufactures and sells light-, medium- and heavy-duty engines for commercial vehicles, construction and agricultural machinery, marine applications and power generation, offering diesel, natural gas and new-energy powertrains including electric, hybrid and fuel cell systems.

The company serves auto OEMs and distributors via a broad sales and service network across China and globally, and in 2025 sold 461,309 engines, generating revenue of RMB 24.6 billion. China Yuchai International has declared a cash dividend of US$0.87 per ordinary share for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, with payment scheduled for July 28, 2026 to shareholders of record on July 17, 2026.

The payout underscores the company’s ability to return cash to investors following a year of substantial engine sales and multi‑billion renminbi revenues, signaling confidence in its operational performance and ongoing positioning in China’s competitive powertrain market. The dividend decision may be viewed by shareholders as a sign of management’s positive assessment of cash generation and balance sheet strength amid evolving demand for conventional and new‑energy powertrain solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:H22) stock is a Buy
with a S$4.28 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hong Leong Asia stock,
see the SG:H22 Stock Forecast page.

More about Hong Leong Asia

China Yuchai International, listed on the NYSE, operates through its principal subsidiary Guangxi Yuchai Machinery Company Limited, one of China’s leading powertrain solutions manufacturers. Founded in 1951, Yuchai designs, manufactures and sells light-, medium- and heavy-duty engines for commercial vehicles, construction and agricultural machinery, marine applications and power generation, offering diesel, natural gas and new-energy powertrains including electric, hybrid and fuel cell systems. The company serves auto OEMs and distributors via a broad sales and service network across China and globally, and in 2025 sold 461,309 engines, generating revenue of RMB 24.6 billion.

China Yuchai International has declared a cash dividend of US$0.87 per ordinary share for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, with payment scheduled for July 28, 2026 to shareholders of record on July 17, 2026. The payout underscores the company’s ability to return cash to investors following a year of substantial engine sales and multi‑billion renminbi revenues, signaling confidence in its operational performance and ongoing positioning in China’s competitive powertrain market.
